# mailu_alternative_domain (Resource)

Manages a Mailu alternative domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailu_alternative_domain" "example" {
  name   = "example.net"
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
